# DevFlow stack manifest

> This file is consumed by LLM agents during PreToolUse hook to discover
> available stack documentation. Generated from `.context/stacks/manifest.yaml`.
> DO NOT edit by hand — regenerated by `devflow stacks validate`.

## Frameworks

(none — this is the DevFlow self-repo, which is a bridge plugin without
application frameworks of its own.)

## How to use

When editing files in user projects that import frameworks declared in
`manifest.yaml`, the PreToolUse hook reads the corresponding
`.context/stacks/refs/<lib>@<version>.md` and injects relevant snippets
into the agent's context via `<STACK_FOR_TASK>` block.

To populate this manifest in a user project, run:

    devflow stacks scrape-batch --from-package

Or for a single library:

    devflow stacks scrape <library> <version>
